description: A security incident has been detected. The Security Operations Center (SOC) reports that the external IP address '198.51.100.42' is involved in a credential stuffing attack against the Aerobridge server. Identify the internal user account that successfully logged in from this IP by analyzing the logs at '/var/log/aerobridge_server.log'. Deactivate the compromised account in the Aerobridge Administration Panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) using credentials 'admin' / 'adminpass123'. Create a report file at '/home/ga/Documents/incident_report.txt' containing the username of the compromised account.
